MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-19-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $22,205.72 AND AGAINST DEFENDANT RONALDO GALIMBA PLUS COSTS AS DETERMINED BY THE COSTS MEMORANDUM PROCEDURE. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Discover Bank is entitled to a judgment in its favor in the amount of $22,205.72 and against defendant Ronaldo Galimba plus costs as determined by the costs memorandum procedure. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)
